sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91585" key="purgh/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυργ-ήρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, of a place, <sense id="n91585.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">furnished with towers, fortified</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κώμη</foreign> Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:18:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.18.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
